creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 213750
gh-0.7.0.diff

Amended:
 * Bumped DISTVERSION to 0.7.0 and updated distinfo.
 * Updated GH_TUPLE dependeny list.
 * Fixed typo in zsh shell completion, s/site_function/site-function/,
   reflected changes in PLIST_FILES.
 * Added remaining docs to PORTDOCS.

Changelog:
 * https://github.com/cli/gh/releases/tag/v0.7.0

Tested:
 * portlint: OK (looks fine).
 * testport: OK (poudriere: 3.3.4).
